---
title: "Research"
---

## The Research Layer

Research pages are where stable math connects to moving frontier material.

Each mature topic should eventually link to:

- theorem families
- application pages
- paper labs
- research directions
- surveys and venue maps

This section is the aggregator for those connections.

## First Page

- [Theorem Families](theorem-families.qmd)
- [Directions](directions.qmd)
- [Surveys](surveys.qmd)
- [Venues](venues.qmd)

## What This Section Should Eventually Contain

- `Theorem Families`: recurring proof and result patterns that appear across many papers
- `Directions`: active frontier maps by area
- `Surveys`: curated entry points into broader literature
- `Venues`: where different kinds of work are usually published
